perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a rapid montage of event construction sites, showing a large stage truss, event banners for '2025 Hahababy RUN', and workers setting up barriers. (2) A man and a woman appear in a parking lot or open space at night; they are waving their arms excitedly, jumping, and gesturing toward the camera with wide smiles. (3) The scene shifts back to a daytime montage of staff members packing merchandise into blue bags and arranging clothing items on racks under white canopies.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, fast-paced electronic pop music begins immediately with a consistent beat. (2) The music volume lowers slightly as a high-pitched, energetic female voice and a cheerful male voice begin speaking and cheering loudly. (3) The voices cease, and the upbeat background music resumes full volume during a final montage of preparation clips.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '2025 Hahababy RUN' - Decorative hook appearing on various banners and arches. (2) '大家辛苦啦' - Decorative variety-show style text expressing gratitude. (3) 'Hahababy路跑架設完成了' - Functional subtitle explaining that the race setup is complete. (4) '快快樂樂出門 平平安安回家' and '明天見' - Decorative emotional text wishing for safety and a 'see you tomorrow' sign-off.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Event setup montage -> Hosts energetic announcement -> Prep work montage

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female creator, approximately 6 workers in the background and packing scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young man with dyed red hair wearing a white oversized t-shirt; a young woman with hair in a bun wearing a black denim jacket over a crop top and grey shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large event stage with scaffolding, a start/finish line arch, orange traffic cones, white tents, and a large Ferris wheel visible in the distance under a cloudy sky.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Mix of natural daylight and artificial night-time studio/flood lights.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage -> Dialogue -> Montage: Hook -> Evidence -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the '2025 Hahababy RUN' by showing the completed event infrastructure and the enthusiasm of the organizers, effectively acting as a 'final call' or hype video for participants.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on the setup and branding of the Hahababy event.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses fast-paced editing and bright text overlays typical of Taiwanese variety show style content to create excitement.
